paper.title: Policy rules for inflation targeting
paper.journal_or_series: Journal of Economic Dynamics & Control 32, pp. 2512-2535

raw_pdf.source_role: manually downloaded source PDF; body not opened by default

appendix_normalization.source_role: hand-normalized appendix formula inventory when present

implementation_cross_check.notes: Used only to identify the Rep-MMB selected rule coefficients, variables, shocks, and linear model form; not used as a paper-side mathematical source.

source_sniff.first_page_authors: Glenn D. Rudebusch; Lars E.O. Svensson
source_sniff.notes: First 80 Markdown lines identify the expected title/authors despite OCR mojibake in the word inflation and symbols.

notes: Core equations (2.1), (2.2), loss function, state-space definitions, and simple policy-rule family are readable in MinerU Markdown.
The selected MMB rule coefficients are source-table matched and implementation-cross-checked, but the PDF body was not opened for equation-level verification.
Several OCR artifacts are present in prose and symbols, so first-pass formula uncertainty remains needs_review.

runtime_validation.notes: Dynare was intentionally not run. Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
